title: Product Plans
answer: We offer three pricing plans: Basic at $10 per month, Pro at $25 per month, and Enterprise at $60 per month. Each tier provides increasing storage capacity and customer support levels.

title: Support Hours
answer: Our support team is available Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM local time. Enterprise plan subscribers receive priority response for urgent issues.

title: Feature Summary
answer: Our platform includes features such as instant messaging, file sharing, searchable conversation history, and basic analytics for user activity.

title: Account Reset
answer: To reset your password, please follow the reset process: check your email for a temporary verification code, then create a new secure password.

title: Privacy Policy
answer: Your data is stored securely and locally. We do not make external calls or share information outside of our secure environment.
